title: CLEAR Ant Control Spray, 800 ml
features: Fast action, kills ants within minutes of application
Plant based active ingredient – also contains synthetic active ingredient
Apply directly on ants, their pathways or shelters
For indoor and outdoor use around the house

Previous page Fast-acting spray Fast action, kills ants within minutes of application. Ready to use Can be used indoors and outdoors. Apply as a spray application to surfaces where ants are seen. Certified for use in organic systems AntClear uses active ingredients derived from nature and is certified for use in organic systems. Next page 1 Fast-Acting Spray 2 Ready To Use 3 For Organic Systems Kills ants fast and stops them coming back AntClear Ant Control Spray kills ants within minutes after application when sprayed directly on ants, walking paths or shelters. Based on active ingredients derived from plants, it is safe to use around the house – indoors and out – however, it is recommended to avoid using outdoor when rain is forecast. AntClear Ant Control Spray is certified by OF&G and the bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic and is fully recyclable. Why should I use AntClear Ant Control Spray? Ant Control Spray provides fast protection from ants and can be used indoors and outdoors (around premises). Ideal for those hard-to-access crevices. Effective against a large range of household ants. Developed from plant based active ingredients. Where can I use AntClear Ant Control Spray? Can be used indoors and outdoors (around premises).. Spray along the surfaces where you have seen the insects active and around the places (doors, windows, skirting) where they are gaining entry. When should I use AntClear Ant Control Spray? AntClear Ant Control Spray can be used at any time of the year, when ant activity is discovered. How do I use AntClear Ant Control Spray? Apply as a spray application to surfaces where ants are seen. Spray at a distance of 20-30cm directly onto ants. 1 to 2 sprays. Do not contaminate foodstuffs, eating utensils or food contact surfaces. Do not touch treated surfaces until dry.
